title: FDA Approves Expanded Label for Ionis' Tryngolza
headline: FDA approves expanded indication for Ionis' Tryngolza (olezarsen), making it the first treatment to reduce risk of acute pancreatitis associated with severe hypertriglyceridemia, transforming it from rare-disease niche to potential blockbuster.
key_facts: FDA approval June 25, 2026; Tryngolza previously approved for familial chylomicronemia syndrome; new indication addresses significantly larger patient population with severe hypertriglyceridemia

title: Merck KGaA Acquires Bio-Techne for $11.3B
headline: Merck KGaA (Darmstadt) announces largest acquisition in over a decade, acquiring diagnostics and life sciences tools company Bio-Techne for $73 per share in an all-cash deal valued at $11.3 billion.
key_facts: $11.3 billion deal value; $73 per share all-cash; largest deal in 10+ years for Merck KGaA; announced June 25, 2026

title: Healthcare Sector Outperforms S&P 500
headline: Healthcare sector gains +1.58% on June 25, outperforming S&P 500's +0.01%, led by AbbVie +3.51% and Merck +4.02%, with Drug Manufacturers subsector up +1.60%.
key_facts: Healthcare sector day return +1.58% vs. S&P 500 +0.01%; YTD healthcare +6.03% vs. S&P 500 +6.69%; AbbVie +3.51% to $243.14 (market cap $429.6B); Merck +4.02% to $125.45 (market cap $309.8B); Drug Manufacturers subsector +1.60% day, +18.79% YTD; Biotechnology subsector +1.25% day, +13.87% YTD; Gilead -1.05%; Pfizer -1.54%

title: SCOTUS Rules on Bayer Roundup Litigation
headline: Supreme Court ruling limits state-level claims against Bayer regarding Roundup herbicide, potentially reducing future litigation exposure for the company.
key_facts: SCOTUS ruling issued June 25, 2026; blunts state-level claims; Bayer has previously spent over $10 billion settling Roundup claims

title: Gilead's Trodelvy Approved for Front-Line TNBC
headline: Gilead Sciences receives FDA approval for Trodelvy (sacituzumab govitecan) in front-line triple-negative breast cancer, though stock dips -1.05% on June 25 in possible sell-the-news reaction.
key_facts: FDA approval issued June 24, 2026; indication: front-line TNBC; Gilead stock -1.05% on June 25

title: Pfizer's Seagen ADC Fails in Lung Cancer Trial
headline: Pfizer's acquired Seagen ADC therapy fails in late-stage lung cancer trial, further pressuring stock -1.54% and highlighting class divergence as competitors succeed with anthracycline-based therapies.
key_facts: $43 billion Seagen acquisition; late-stage lung cancer trial failure; Pfizer stock -1.54% on June 25

title: Achieve Life Sciences Receives FDA CRL
headline: Achieve Life Sciences receives Complete Response Letter from FDA, details not yet specified.
key_facts: Complete Response Letter issued June 25, 2026; specific indication/drug not specified in available text

title: Oblenio Bio Raises $62M for Autoimmune Programs
headline: Oblenio Bio raises $62 million in financing led by Pfizer Ventures for development of autoimmune disease treatments.
key_facts: $62 million financing; led by Pfizer Ventures; focus: autoimmune disease; announced June 25, 2026

title: Remix to Go Public via Passage Bio Merger
headline: Remix Therapeutics to go public via reverse merger with Passage Bio, utilizing the gene therapy company's Nasdaq listing to advance mRNA degrader platform.
key_facts: Reverse merger transaction; Passage Bio provides Nasdaq listing; Remix platform: mRNA degraders; announced June 25, 2026

title: Ollin Raises $330M for Vabysmo Competitor
headline: Ollin Therapeutics raises $330 million to fund pivotal trials of an ophthalmology drug licensed from China-based developer, positioning as competitor to Roche's Vabysmo.
key_facts: $330 million financing; indication: ophthalmology; licensed from China-based developer; announced June 25, 2026

title: Novartis & Antares Partner on Small Molecule Discovery
headline: Novartis and Antares Pharma (Scorpion Therapeutics spinout) announce $105 million upfront small molecule drug discovery pact.
key_facts: $105 million upfront; small molecule discovery pact; Antares is Scorpion Therapeutics spinout; announced June 25, 2026

title: RQ Bio Raises $115M for Preventive Flu Antibody
headline: RQ Bio raises $115 million in financing to advance development of preventive antibody therapeutic for influenza.
key_facts: $115 million financing; therapeutic class: preventive antibody; indication: influenza; announced June 25, 2026
